verdict_reason: Solid error-path and metadata coverage, but no test pins the message body, leaving the core AC behaviour (posted content forwarded to ASB) unasserted; plus two minor convention gaps (Given/When/Then blocks, should-form test names)

todos.issue: No test asserts the ServiceBusMessage body equals the serialised input JSON — the core AC behaviour (posted content forwarded to ASB) is unpinned; publish could send an empty/wrong payload and all tests stay green
todos.fix: In publish_sendsMessageToServiceBus, capture the message and assert sent.getBody().toString() equals the input JSON (e.g. {"key":"value"}) instead of verify(...).sendMessage(any(...))

todos.issue: Tests omit the explicit // Given, // When, // Then comment blocks required by the unit-testing guide
todos.fix: Add // Given / // When / // Then comment blocks to each test (// When & Then may be combined for the exception test)

todos.issue: Test names (publish_sendsMessageToServiceBus, publish_setsContentTypeAndMessageId, publish_throwsGatewayException_whenSendFails) drop the 'should' form required by the {subject}_{shouldDoWhat}[_{whenContext}] convention
